headline: Deterministic zero-LLM 'where am I' digest -- parses git log + transcript JSONL into commits-by-category, honest LOC split, shipped-vs-oriented conversations, and the orientation tax. ~1 second, no agents.

capabilities.label: Orientation digest for a repo/date range (read-only, JSON)
capabilities.notes: `--json` is baked into invoke (not caller-optional) -- verified empirically that bearings.py's plain-text mode mojibakes em-dashes in commit subjects on Windows (returncode 0, but output corrupted: '#' BEARINGS � Pre Atlas � ...'); --json sidesteps it because json.dumps default-escapes non-ASCII. `repo` defaults to cwd (the gateway sets cwd to repo_root for tools with no system-map entry, i.e. this repo) when omitted. `date`/`days` narrow or widen the window; omit both for 'today'.

capabilities.label: Same digest, ALSO appends it to the durable bearings ledger
capabilities.notes: Appends to ~/.claude/logs/bearings/<repo-slug>/<date>.md -- a private local log file, not a mutation of any tracked repo state. Marked write for honest labeling (it does append to disk) even though the blast radius is a personal cache file, not shared/tracked state.
triggers: save today's digest to the ledger
